title: NATO Chief welcomes Iran leader’s death
fullText: NewsFeedMark Rutte says the world is “better off” with Iran’s Supreme Leader gone, arguing that degrading Tehran’s nuclear and ballistic capabilities strengthens security in Europe and the Middle East. Rutte stressed NATO is not involved militarily but will defend “every inch” of its territory.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: NATO Chief Mark Rutte says the world is “better off” with Iran’s Supreme Leader gone.
